file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to read

offset.description: The line number to start reading from (1-based)

limit.description: The number of lines to read (default: 2000)

function.description: Read only this function/method/type. For .go files uses AST; for others uses regex. Overrides offset/limit

force.description: Force re-read even if cached (default: false)

hashes.description: Prefix each line with a short content-hash anchor (columns: line<TAB>anchor<TAB>content). Pass an anchor to edit's anchor= to replace that line without reproducing it as old_string (saves output tokens). Default: false

spill_id.description: The spillover reference ID (e.g., sp_abc123) from a previous large tool result

file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to write

content.description: The content to write to the file

file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to modify

old_string.description: The text to replace (must be unique unless replace_all is true). When regex=true, treated as a regex pattern

new_string.description: The text to replace it with. When regex=true, supports $1/$2 backreferences

replace_all.description: Replace all occurrences instead of requiring a unique match (default: false)

regex.description: Treat old_string as a regex pattern (default: false)

line.description: Replace at a specific line number (1-based). When set, old_string matches only on this line

anchor.description: Content-hash anchor from read(hashes=true) identifying the line to replace. Replaces the whole anchored line with new_string — no old_string needed. Errors if the anchor matches zero or multiple (identical) lines

anchor_end.description: Optional second anchor. With anchor set, replaces the inclusive line range anchor..anchor_end with new_string (which may span multiple lines)

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern to search for

path.description: File or directory to search in

contextLines.description: Lines of context around each match (0-10)

before.description: Lines of context before each match (overrides contextLines for before)

after.description: Lines of context after each match (overrides contextLines for after)

multiline.description: Enable multiline matching (patterns can span lines, . matches newlines)

mode.description: Output mode: content (default, matching lines), files_only (file paths only), count (match counts per file)

background.description: Run in background immediately, then use process tool to check output

structured.description: Return JSON with stdout, stderr, exit_code, runtime_ms instead of plain text

env.description: Environment variables to set for this command (key-value pairs). Blocked keys (API keys, secrets) are filtered.

sessionId.description: Session ID for actions other than list

input.description: Data to write to process stdin (required for write action)

url.description: URL to fetch (HTML extraction + bot evasion)

query.description: Web search query. Serper (Google) > Brave > DuckDuckGo fallback

fetch.description: Auto-fetch top N results per query (1-3, default: 0)

count.description: Number of search results per query (default: 5)

type.description: Serper search type: news (Google News), scholar (Google Scholar), autocomplete (search suggestions). Default: regular web search.

name: cron
description:
Manage scheduled tasks (cron jobs). Actions: add (create), list (all jobs), status (service health),
get (job detail), update (modify), remove (delete), run (execute now), runs (execution history).
Schedule formats: cron expression (0 9 * * * = daily 9am), interval (30m, 1h), one-shot (ISO timestamp).
Common patterns: 0 9 * * * (daily 9am), 0 */2 * * * (every 2h), 0 9 * * 1-5 (weekdays 9am), @daily, @hourly.

name.description: Job name (required for add, used as job ID)

schedule.description: Schedule specification. Formats: cron (0 9 * * *), interval (1h, 30m, every 5m), timestamp (2026-04-06T08:00:00), shorthand (@daily, @hourly, @weekly)

command.description: Agent message/command to execute on schedule (required for add)

enabled.description: Enable or disable a job (for add/update)

limit.description: Max entries to return (for runs action, default 10)

tz.description: Timezone for cron schedules (e.g. Asia/Seoul, UTC). Defaults to system local timezone

staggerMs.description: Random delay window in ms to distribute cron jobs (cron kind only, default: auto for top-of-hour)

anchorTime.description: Anchor time for interval schedules (ISO 8601). Intervals count from this time instead of registration time

retryCount.description: Number of retry attempts on failure (0-3, default 0 = no retry)

retryBackoffMs.description: Initial backoff delay between retries in ms (default 5000). Doubles each retry, capped at 60s

deliveryMode.description: How to deliver output: announce (send to Telegram, default) or none (run silently)

job.description: Job definition object (alternative to top-level name/schedule/command)

text.description: System event text for wake action

question.description: Korean question asking the user to resolve an ambiguity. Example: '현재 3개의 config.yaml이 있습니다. 어느 것을 수정할까요?'

options.description: 2-5 selection options. Each must be Korean text, 40 characters or less (visible as a Telegram inline-keyboard button label).

action.description: Gateway action. config_get/config_set: read or write a single dotted path. config.get: full config snapshot. config.apply: replace the whole config. config.patch: merge a patch object. config.schema.lookup: schema for a path. Destructive actions (restart/update/config_set/config.apply/config.patch) require approval: the first call returns a needs_approval envelope; after the user confirms, call the .confirmed variant with the same action_token.

path.description: Dotted config path for config_get / config_set (e.g. "model.main"). Also used for config.schema.lookup.

value.description: Leaf value to write (config_set only). Must be a scalar, array, or null — object replacement is rejected.

action_token.description: Token returned by a prior approval envelope; required when calling a .confirmed variant.

limit.description: Max sessions (list) or messages (history, default 20) to return

tool_preset.description: Tool preset restricting which tools the sub-agent can use. researcher=read-only, implementer=read+write+build, verifier=read+test+exec

file_path.description: Path to the file to send

type.description: Media type. Auto-detected from MIME if omitted

query.description: Gmail search query (supports Gmail operators like from:, to:, subject:, newer_than:, is:unread, has:attachment, etc.)

message_id.description: Email message ID (for read, reply, label, attachment actions; for thread action, resolves the containing thread)

thread_id.description: Gmail thread ID (for thread action; if omitted, message_id resolves the thread)

attachment.description: Attachment selector for the attachment action: a filename (or substring) or 1-based index. Omit to list all attachments of the message. PDFs are extracted to text (OCR fallback for scans). Office docs are extracted via stdlib OOXML readers: Excel (.xlsx), Word (.docx), PowerPoint (.pptx). Image attachments go through OCR. Text files returned directly.

download.description: For the attachment action: when true, save the selected attachment to a local file and return its path instead of extracting text. Pass that path to the send_file tool to forward the file to the user.

to.description: Recipient email or contact alias (auto-resolved from KV store gmail.contacts.<alias>). Use 'self' (or me/나/본인) to send to your own tracked mailbox.

body.description: Email body text (plain text or HTML if html=true)

max.description: Maximum results (for inbox/search, or messages kept for thread; default: 10, max: 50)

action.description: Action: list (search/browse skills), create, patch, delete, read, list_files, write_file, remove_file

query.description: Search filter for list action (matches name, description, category, tag)

category.description: Filter category for list, or target category for create (coding, productivity, devops, integration)

content.description: Full SKILL.md content for create, or patch content

old_text.description: Text to find in SKILL.md (patch action). Fuzzy whitespace matching

file_path.description: Relative path within skill dir for read/write_file/remove_file. Writes/removes must stay under references/, templates/, scripts/, or assets/

file_content.description: Content for write_file support file writes

apply.description: Immediately invalidate the system prompt skills cache so the change is visible in the current session (default: false — changes load on next session to preserve prompt-cache hit rate).

action.description: Action: search (ripgrep full-text search), read (read wiki page), index (read master/category index), write (create/update page), log (append diary entry), daily (read recent diary), status (wiki stats)

query.description: Search query (search), page path (read/write), category name (index), or diary entry body (log)

category.description: Wiki category for write action or index filter

content.description: Page body content in markdown (write action) or diary entry body (log action)

type.description: Page type (write action): concept, entity, source, comparison, log

confidence.description: Confidence level (write action): high (verified), medium (reasonable inference), low (uncertain)

due.description: Upcoming deadline in YYYY-MM-DD (write action): payment due, delivery, or milestone date. Surfaced by the morning letter deadline scan.

section.description: Read a specific section from the page (read action)

action.description: lookup: 전화번호로 인물 찾기 (정규화·+82↔0·뒷자리 폴백). search: 이름·회사·이메일·번호 부분일치 검색 (최대 20건).

query.description: 조회할 전화번호 (lookup) 또는 검색어 — 이름/회사/이메일/번호 일부 (search).

action.description: search: 현재 세션의 과거 메시지에서 키워드 검색 (모든 메시지가 SQLite FTS에 무손실 저장). describe: 압축된 요약 구간 ID 목록 (time_range 필터). expand: 특정 summary_id의 원문 메시지 복원, question 추가 시 LLM이 원문 기반 답변.

time_range.description: 시간 범위 (describe action): today, this_week, all

summary_id.description: 요약 노드 ID (expand action, describe 결과에서 획득)

question.description: 원본 대화에서 알고 싶은 질문 (expand action, 선택)

op.description: recall: wiki + hindsight 병렬 검색 (federated). read: ref로 단건 fetch — `w:인물/박부장` 같이 prefix가 layer 라우팅. record: wiki에 큐레이션 페이지 작성·갱신 (hindsight는 자동이라 명시 record 없음).

page.description: wiki 페이지 상대 경로 (op=record). 카테고리/이름 형식 — 예: `인물/박부장`, `운영시스템/ABC상사-NDA`

title.description: 페이지 제목 (op=record, 미지정 시 page의 마지막 segment 사용)

body.description: 페이지 본문 markdown (op=record). 비어 있으면 새 페이지에 기본 골격 자동 삽입

importance.description: Tier1 surfacing 가중치 0.0~1.0 (op=record, 0.85↑은 시스템 프롬프트에 자동 노출)

names.description: Exact tool names to activate (from the deferred tools list)

query.description: Keyword search to find matching deferred tools (alternative to names)

action.description: query: BFS/DFS traversal of the knowledge graph for a natural-language question. explain: plain-language description of a node and its neighbors. path: shortest path between two nodes

node.description: Required for action=explain. Node label (page id, file path, symbol, or function name) to explain

from.description: Required for action=path. Source node label

to.description: Required for action=path. Target node label

budget.description: Optional for action=query. Max output tokens (default: 2000)

dfs.description: Optional for action=query. Use depth-first instead of breadth-first traversal (default: false)

graph.description: Which graph to query. "wiki" (default, ~/.deneb/wiki-graph/graph.json — concept/entity knowledge from the wiki dreamer), "code" (workspace/graphify-out/graph.json — call/import graph built by graphify update), or an absolute/relative path to a custom graph.json

content.description: Full new contents of ~/.deneb/HEARTBEAT.md. Pass empty string to clear the file. The autonomous heartbeat loop reads this file every 30 minutes; remove completed/cancelled items, update progress on ongoing items, and use a '## archive' section for items that have stalled.

source.description: YouTube URL or local video file path to watch (extract frames + subtitles, then analyze with the vision model)

task.description: What to analyze in the video (e.g. 'analyze the hook in the first 3 seconds', 'where does the UI break?'). Default: general analysis

start.description: Optional analysis window start in seconds

end.description: Optional analysis window end in seconds
